message:
fix(pager): differentiate freelist page-lease handling by transaction mode

Non-concurrent aborts now clear lease pages (since next_page resets,
they would be re-issued naturally and freelisting them caused sparse
page holes). Concurrent aborts correctly return lease+EOF pages to the
freelist since next_page stays advanced. Read-only transactions get a
defensive clear. Applied to both Transaction and SimpleTransaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
